ar: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْوَلِيدِ، حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ، قَالَ عَبْدُ الْمَلِكِ بْنُ مَيْسَرَةَ أَخْبَرَنِي قَالَ سَمِعْتُ النَّزَّالَ، سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ، يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ رَجُلاً، قَرَأَ آيَةً سَمِعْتُ مِنَ النَّبِيِّ، صلى الله عليه وسلم خِلاَفَهَا، فَأَخَذْتُ بِيَدِهِ، فَأَتَيْتُ بِهِ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَقَالَ ‏"‏ كِلاَكُمَا مُحْسِنٌ ‏"‏‏.‏ قَالَ شُعْبَةُ أَظُنُّهُ قَالَ ‏"‏ لاَ تَخْتَلِفُوا فَإِنَّ مَنْ كَانَ قَبْلَكُمُ اخْتَلَفُوا فَهَلَكُوا ‏"‏‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْوَلِيدِ، حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ، قَالَ عَبْدُ الْمَلِكِ بْنُ مَيْسَرَةَ أَخْبَرَنِي قَالَ سَمِعْتُ النَّزَّالَ، سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ، يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ رَجُلاً، قَرَأَ آيَةً سَمِعْتُ مِنَ النَّبِيِّ، صلى الله عليه وسلم خِلاَفَهَا، فَأَخَذْتُ بِيَدِهِ، فَأَتَيْتُ بِهِ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَقَالَ " كِلاَكُمَا مُحْسِنٌ ". قَالَ شُعْبَةُ أَظُنُّهُ قَالَ " لاَ تَخْتَلِفُوا فَإِنَّ مَنْ كَانَ قَبْلَكُمُ اخْتَلَفُوا فَهَلَكُوا ".
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْوَلِيدِ، حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ، قَالَ عَبْدُ الْمَلِكِ بْنُ مَيْسَرَةَ أَخْبَرَنِي قَالَ سَمِعْتُ النَّزَّالَ، سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ، يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ رَجُلاً، قَرَأَ آيَةً سَمِعْتُ مِنَ النَّبِيِّ، صلى الله عليه وسلم خِلاَف
matn_ar: َهَا، فَأَخَذْتُ بِيَدِهِ، فَأَتَيْتُ بِهِ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَقَالَ " كِلاَكُمَا مُحْسِنٌ ". قَالَ شُعْبَةُ أَظُنُّهُ قَالَ " لاَ تَخْتَلِفُوا فَإِنَّ مَنْ كَانَ قَبْلَكُمُ اخْتَلَفُوا فَهَلَكُوا ".
matn_ar_clean: ها، فأخذت بيده، فأتيت به رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم فقال " كلاكما محسن ". قال شعبة أظنه قال " لا تختلفوا فإن من كان قبلكم اختلفوا فهلكوا ".
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated `Abdullah:I heard a man reciting a verse (of the Holy Qur'an) but I had heard the Prophet (ﷺ) reciting it differently. So, I caught hold of the man by the hand and took him to Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) who said, "Both of you are right." Shu`ba, the sub-narrator said, "I think he said to them, "Don't differ, for the nations before you differed and perished (because of their differences)
iwh_en: Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that i heard a man reciting a verse (of the Holy Qur'an) but I had heard the Prophet ﷺ reciting it differently. So, I caught hold of the man by the hand and took him to Allah's Messenger ﷺ who said, "Both of you are right." Shu`ba, the sub-narrator said, "I think he said to them, "Don't differ, for the nations before you differed and perished (because of their differences)
iwh_id: Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa aku mendengar a man reciting a ayat (of the Holy Al-Qur'an) namun aku had mendengar Nabi ﷺ reciting itu differently. So, aku caught hold of the man oleh the tangan dan mengambil dia kepada Rasulullah ﷺ yang berkata, "Both of kamu are right." Shu`ba, the sub-perawi berkata, "Aku think ia berkata kepada them, "Don't differ, untuk the nations sebelum kamu differed dan perished (because of mereka differences)

ar: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ قَزَعَةَ، حَدَّثَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ سَعْدٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ، عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ، وَعَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الأَعْرَجِ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قَالَ اسْتَبَّ رَجُلاَنِ رَجُلٌ مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَرَجُلٌ مِنَ الْيَهُودِ، قَالَ الْمُسْلِمُ وَالَّذِي اصْطَفَى مُحَمَّدًا عَلَى الْعَالَمِينَ، فَقَالَ الْيَهُودِيُّ وَالَّذِي اصْطَفَى مُوسَى عَلَى الْعَالَمِينَ‏.‏ فَرَفَعَ الْمُسْلِمُ يَدَهُ عِنْدَ ذَلِكَ فَلَطَمَ وَجْهَ الْيَهُودِيِّ، فَذَهَبَ الْيَهُودِيُّ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَأَخْبَرَهُ بِمَا كَانَ مِنْ أَمْرِهِ وَأَمْرِ الْمُسْلِمِ، فَدَعَا النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم الْمُسْلِمَ فَسَأَلَهُ عَنْ ذَلِكَ، فَأَخْبَرَهُ فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏ "‏ لاَ تُخَيِّرُونِي عَلَى مُوسَى، فَإِنَّ النَّاسَ يَصْعَقُونَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ، فَأَصْعَقُ مَعَهُمْ، فَأَكُونُ أَوَّلَ مَنْ يُفِيقُ، فَإِذَا مُوسَى بَاطِشٌ جَانِبَ الْعَرْشِ، فَلاَ أَدْرِي أَكَانَ فِيمَنْ صَعِقَ فَأَفَاقَ قَبْلِي، أَوْ كَانَ مِمَّنِ اسْتَثْنَى اللَّهُ ‏"‏‏.‏

matn_ar_clean: د ذلك فلطم وجه اليهودي، فذهب اليهودي إلى النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فأخبره بما كان من أمره وأمر المسلم، فدعا النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم المسلم فسأله عن ذلك، فأخبره فقال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم " لا تخيروني على موسى، فإن الناس يصعقون يوم القيامة، فأصعق معهم، فأكون أول من يفيق، فإذا موسى باطش جانب العرش، فلا أدري أكان فيمن صعق فأفاق قبلي، أو كان ممن استثنى الله ".

isnad_chain.name_en: Abu Hurairah [may Allah be pleased with him]

sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Abu Huraira:Two persons, a Muslim and a Jew, quarreled. The Muslim said, "By Him Who gave Muhammad superiority over all the people! The Jew said, "By Him Who gave Moses superiority over all the people!" At that the Muslim raised his hand and slapped the Jew on the face. The Jew went to the Prophet and informed him of what had happened between him and the Muslim. The Prophet (ﷺ) sent for the Muslim and asked him about it. The Muslim informed him of the event. The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "Do not give me superiority over Moses, for on the Day of Resurrection all the people will fall unconscious and I will be one of them, but I will. be the first to gain consciousness, and will see Moses standing and holding the side of the Throne (of Allah). I will not know whether (Moses) has also fallen unconscious and got up before me, or Allah has exempted him from that stroke
iwh_en: Abu Huraira (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that two persons, a Muslim and a Jew, quarreled. The Muslim said, "By Him Who gave Muhammad superiority over all the people! The Jew said, "By Him Who gave Moses superiority over all the people!" At that the Muslim raised his hand and slapped the Jew on the face. The Jew went to the Prophet ﷺ and informed him of what had happened between him and the Muslim. the Prophet ﷺ sent for the Muslim and asked him about it. The Muslim informed him of the event. the Prophet ﷺ said, "Do not give me superiority over Moses, for on the Day of Resurrection all the people will fall unconscious and I will be one of them, but I will. be the first to gain consciousness, and will see Moses standing and holding the side of the Throne (of Allah). I will not know whether (Moses) has also fallen unconscious and got up before me, or Allah has exempted him from that stroke
iwh_id: Abu Huraira (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa dua perputras, a Muslim dan a Jew, quarreled. The Muslim berkata, "By Him Who memberikan Muhammad superiority di atas semua the orang-orang! The Jew berkata, "By Him Who memberikan Moses superiority di atas semua the orang-orang!" At bahwa the Muslim mengangkat -nya tangan dan slapped the Jew di the face. The Jew pergi kepada Nabi ﷺ dan memberitahukan dia of apa had happened antara dia dan the Muslim. Nabi ﷺ mengutus untuk the Muslim dan bertanya dia tentang it. The Muslim memberitahukan dia of the event. Nabi ﷺ berkata, "Do not give saya superiority di atas Moses, untuk di the Hari Kebangkitan semua the orang-orang will fall unconscious dan aku will be satu of them, namun aku will. be the pertama kepada gain consciousness, dan will see Moses standing dan holding the side of the Throne (of Allah). aku will not know apakah (Moses) has juga fallen unconscious dan got up sebelum me, or Allah has exempted dia dari bahwa stroke

ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُوسَى بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ، حَدَّثَنَا وُهَيْبٌ، حَدَّثَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ يَحْيَى، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ الْخُدْرِيِّ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قَالَ بَيْنَمَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم جَالِسٌ جَاءَ يَهُودِيٌّ، فَقَالَ يَا أَبَا الْقَاسِمِ ضَرَبَ وَجْهِي رَجُلٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِكَ‏.‏ فَقَالَ ‏"‏ مَنْ ‏"‏‏.‏ قَالَ رَجُلٌ مِنَ الأَنْصَارِ‏.‏ قَالَ ‏"‏ ادْعُوهُ ‏"‏‏.‏ فَقَالَ ‏"‏ أَضَرَبْتَهُ ‏"‏‏.‏ قَالَ سَمِعْتُهُ بِالسُّوقِ يَحْلِفُ وَالَّذِي اصْطَفَى مُوسَى عَلَى الْبَشَرِ‏.‏ قُلْتُ أَىْ خَبِيثُ، عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَأَخَذَتْنِي غَضْبَةٌ ضَرَبْتُ وَجْهَهُ‏.‏ فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ لاَ تُخَيِّرُوا بَيْنَ الأَنْبِيَاءِ، فَإِنَّ النَّاسَ يَصْعَقُونَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ، فَأَكُونُ أَوَّلَ مَنْ تَنْشَقُّ عَنْهُ الأَرْضُ، فَإِذَا أَنَا بِمُوسَى آخِذٌ بِقَائِمَةٍ مِنْ قَوَائِمِ الْعَرْشِ، فَلاَ أَدْرِي أَكَانَ فِيمَنْ صَعِقَ، أَمْ حُوسِبَ بِصَعْقَةِ الأُولَى ‏"‏‏.‏

matn_ar: أَضَرَبْتَهُ ". قَالَ سَمِعْتُهُ بِالسُّوقِ يَحْلِفُ وَالَّذِي اصْطَفَى مُوسَى عَلَى الْبَشَرِ. قُلْتُ أَىْ خَبِيثُ، عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَأَخَذَتْنِي غَضْبَةٌ ضَرَبْتُ وَجْهَهُ. فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم " لاَ تُخَيِّرُوا بَيْنَ الأَنْبِيَاءِ، فَإِنَّ النَّاسَ يَصْعَقُونَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ، فَأَكُونُ أَوَّلَ مَنْ تَنْشَقُّ عَنْهُ الأَرْضُ، فَإِذَا أَنَا بِمُوسَى آخِذٌ بِقَائِمَةٍ مِنْ قَوَائِمِ الْعَرْشِ، فَلاَ أَدْرِي أَكَانَ فِيمَنْ صَعِقَ، أَمْ حُوسِبَ بِصَعْقَةِ الأُولَى ".
matn_ar_clean: أضربته ". قال سمعته بالسوق يحلف والذي اصطفى موسى على البشر. قلت أى خبيث، على محمد صلى الله عليه وسلم فأخذتني غضبة ضربت وجهه. فقال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم " لا تخيروا بين الأنبياء، فإن الناس يصعقون يوم القيامة، فأكون أول من تنشق عنه الأرض، فإذا أنا بموسى آخذ بقائمة من قوائم العرش، فلا أدري أكان فيمن صعق، أم حوسب بصعقة الأولى ".
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Abu Sa`id Al-Khudri:While Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) was sitting, a Jew came and said, "O Abul Qasim! One of your companions has slapped me on my face." The Prophet (ﷺ) asked who that was. He replied that he was one of the Ansar. The Prophet (ﷺ) sent for him, and on his arrival, he asked him whether he had beaten the Jew. He (replied in the affirmative and) said, "I heard him taking an oath in the market saying, 'By Him Who gave Moses superiority over all the human beings.' I said, 'O wicked man! (Has Allah given Moses superiority) even over Muhammad I became furious and slapped him over his face." The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "Do not give a prophet superiority over another, for on the Day of Resurrection all the people will fall unconscious and I will be the first to emerge from the earth, and will see Moses standing and holding one of the legs of the Throne. I will not know whether Moses has fallen unconscious or the first unconsciousness was sufficient for him
iwh_en: Abu Sa`id Al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that while Allah's Messenger ﷺ was sitting, a Jew came and said, "O Abul Qasim! One of your companions has slapped me on my face." the Prophet ﷺ asked who that was. He replied that he was one of the Ansar. the Prophet ﷺ sent for him, and on his arrival, he asked him whether he had beaten the Jew. He (replied in the affirmative and) said, "I heard him taking an oath in the market saying, 'By Him Who gave Moses superiority over all the human beings.' I said, 'O wicked man! (Has Allah given Moses superiority) even over Muhammad I became furious and slapped him over his face." the Prophet ﷺ said, "Do not give a prophet superiority over another, for on the Day of Resurrection all the people will fall unconscious and I will be the first to emerge from the earth, and will see Moses standing and holding one of the legs of the Throne. I will not know whether Moses has fallen unconscious or the first unconsciousness was sufficient for him
iwh_id: Abu Sa`id Al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa sementara Rasulullah ﷺ was sitting, a Jew datang dan berkata, "O Abul Qasim! One of kamu para sahabat has slapped saya di -ku face." Nabi ﷺ bertanya yang bahwa was. Ia menjawab bahwa ia was satu of the Anshar. Nabi ﷺ mengutus untuk him, dan di -nya arrival, ia bertanya dia apakah ia had beaten the Jew. Ia (menjawab dengan mengiyakan and) berkata, "Aku mendengar dia taraja an oath dalam the pasar saying, 'By Him Who memberikan Moses superiority di atas semua the human beings.' Aku berkata, 'O wicked man! (Has Allah diberikan Moses superiority) bahkan di atas Muhammad aku became furious dan slapped dia di atas -nya face." Nabi ﷺ berkata, "Do not give a prophet superiority di atas another, untuk di the Hari Kebangkitan semua the orang-orang will fall unconscious dan aku will be the pertama kepada emerge dari the earth, dan will see Moses standing dan holding satu of the legs of the Throne. aku will not know apakah Moses has fallen unconscious or the pertama unconsciousness was sufficient untuk him

ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُوسَى، حَدَّثَنَا هَمَّامٌ، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسٍ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ أَنَّ يَهُودِيًّا، رَضَّ رَأْسَ جَارِيَةٍ بَيْنَ حَجَرَيْنِ، قِيلَ مَنْ فَعَلَ هَذَا بِكِ أَفُلاَنٌ، أَفُلاَنٌ حَتَّى سُمِّيَ الْيَهُودِيُّ فَأَوْمَتْ بِرَأْسِهَا، فَأُخِذَ الْيَهُودِيُّ فَاعْتَرَفَ، فَأَمَرَ بِهِ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَرُضَّ رَأْسُهُ بَيْنَ حَجَرَيْنِ‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا مُوسَى، حَدَّثَنَا هَمَّامٌ، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسٍ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ أَنَّ يَهُودِيًّا، رَضَّ رَأْسَ جَارِيَةٍ بَيْنَ حَجَرَيْنِ، قِيلَ مَنْ فَعَلَ هَذَا بِكِ أَفُلاَنٌ، أَفُلاَنٌ حَتَّى سُمِّيَ الْيَهُودِيُّ فَأَوْمَتْ بِرَأْسِهَا، فَأُخِذَ الْيَهُودِيُّ فَاعْتَرَفَ، فَأَمَرَ بِهِ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَرُضَّ رَأْسُهُ بَيْنَ حَجَرَيْنِ.
matn_ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُوسَى، حَدَّثَنَا هَمَّامٌ، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسٍ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ أَنَّ يَهُودِيًّا، رَضَّ رَأْسَ جَارِيَةٍ بَيْنَ حَجَرَيْنِ، قِيلَ مَنْ فَعَلَ هَذَا بِكِ أَفُلاَنٌ، أَفُلاَنٌ حَتَّى سُمِّيَ الْيَهُودِيُّ فَأَوْمَتْ بِرَأْسِهَا، فَأُخِذَ الْيَهُودِيُّ فَاعْتَرَفَ، فَأَمَرَ بِهِ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَرُضَّ رَأْسُهُ بَيْنَ حَجَرَيْنِ‏.‏
matn_ar_clean: حدثنا موسى، حدثنا همام، عن قتادة، عن أنس ـ رضى الله عنه ـ أن يهوديا، رض رأس جارية بين حجرين، قيل من فعل هذا بك أفلان، أفلان حتى سمي اليهودي فأومت برأسها، فأخذ اليهودي فاعترف، فأمر به النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فرض رأسه بين حجرين‏.‏
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Anas:A Jew crushed the head of a girl between two stones. The girl was asked who had crushed her head, and some names were mentioned before her, and when the name of the Jew was mentioned, she nodded agreeing. The Jew was captured and when he confessed, the Prophet (ﷺ) ordered that his head be crushed between two stones
iwh_en: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that a Jew crushed the head of a girl between two stones. The girl was asked who had crushed her head, and some names were mentioned before her, and when the name of the Jew was mentioned, she nodded agreeing. The Jew was captured and when he confessed, the Prophet ﷺ ordered that his head be crushed between two stones
iwh_id: Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa a Jew crushed the kepala of a girl antara dua stones. The girl was bertanya yang had crushed dia head, dan beberapa names were menyebut sebelum her, dan ketika the name of the Jew was mentioned, ia nodded agreeing. The Jew was captured dan ketika ia confessed, Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan bahwa -nya kepala be crushed antara dua stones

ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُوسَى بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ، حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ، حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ دِينَارٍ، قَالَ سَمِعْتُ ابْنَ عُمَرَ ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ قَالَ كَانَ رَجُلٌ يُخْدَعُ فِي الْبَيْعِ فَقَالَ لَهُ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏ "‏ إِذَا بَايَعْتَ فَقُلْ لاَ خِلاَبَةَ ‏"‏‏.‏ فَكَانَ يَقُولُهُ‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا مُوسَى بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ، حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ، حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ دِينَارٍ، قَالَ سَمِعْتُ ابْنَ عُمَرَ ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ قَالَ كَانَ رَجُلٌ يُخْدَعُ فِي الْبَيْعِ فَقَالَ لَهُ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم  " إِذَا بَايَعْتَ فَقُلْ لاَ خِلاَبَةَ ". فَكَانَ يَقُولُهُ.
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُوسَى بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ، حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ، حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ دِينَارٍ، قَالَ سَمِعْتُ
matn_ar: ابْنَ عُمَرَ ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ قَالَ كَانَ رَجُلٌ يُخْدَعُ فِي الْبَيْعِ فَقَالَ لَهُ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم " إِذَا بَايَعْتَ فَقُلْ لاَ خِلاَبَةَ ". فَكَانَ يَقُولُهُ.
matn_ar_clean: ابن عمر ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ قال كان رجل يخدع في البيع فقال له النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم " إذا بايعت فقل لا خلابة ". فكان يقوله.
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Ibn `Umar:A man was often cheated in buying. The Prophet (ﷺ) said to him, "When you buy something, say (to the seller), No cheating." The man used to say so thenceforward
iwh_en: Ibn `Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that a man was often cheated in buying. the Prophet ﷺ said to him, "When you buy something, say (to the seller), No cheating." The man used to say so thenceforward
iwh_id: Ibn `Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa a man was sering cheated dalam buying. Nabi ﷺ berkata kepada him, "When kamu buy something, say (to the seller), No cheating." The man biasa mengucapkan sehingga thenceforward

ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَاصِمُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ، حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ أَبِي ذِئْبٍ، عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْمُنْكَدِرِ، عَنْ جَابِرٍ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ أَنَّ رَجُلاً، أَعْتَقَ عَبْدًا لَهُ، لَيْسَ لَهُ مَالٌ غَيْرُهُ، فَرَدَّهُ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم، فَابْتَاعَهُ مِنْهُ نُعَيْمُ بْنُ النَّحَّامِ‏.‏

matn_ar_clean: حدثنا عاصم بن علي، حدثنا ابن أبي ذئب، عن محمد بن المنكدر، عن جابر ـ رضى الله عنه ـ أن رجلا، أعتق عبدا له، ليس له مال غيره، فرده النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم، فابتاعه منه نعيم بن النحام‏.‏
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Jabir:A man manumitted a slave and he had no other property than that, so the Prophet (ﷺ) canceled the manumission (and sold the slave for him). Nu'aim bin Al-Nahham bought the slave from him
iwh_en: Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that a man manumitted a slave and he had no other property than that, so the Prophet ﷺ canceled the manumission (and sold the slave for him). Nu'aim bin Al-Nahham bought the slave from him
iwh_id: Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa a man manumitted a hamba sahaya dan ia had no lain property than that, sehingga Nabi ﷺ canceled the manumission (and dijual the hamba sahaya untuk him). Nu'aim bin Al-Nahham membeli the hamba sahaya dari him

ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدٌ، أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ، عَنِ الأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ شَقِيقٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى يَمِينٍ وَهْوَ فِيهَا فَاجِرٌ لِيَقْتَطِعَ بِهَا مَالَ امْرِئٍ مُسْلِمٍ لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهْوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ ‏"‏‏.‏ قَالَ فَقَالَ الأَشْعَثُ فِيَّ وَاللَّهِ كَانَ ذَلِكَ، كَانَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ رَجُلٍ مِنَ الْيَهُودِ أَرْضٌ فَجَحَدَنِي، فَقَدَّمْتُهُ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَقَالَ لِي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ أَلَكَ بَيِّنَةٌ ‏"‏‏.‏ قُلْتُ لاَ‏.‏ قَالَ فَقَالَ لِلْيَهُودِيِّ ‏"‏ احْلِفْ ‏"‏‏.‏ قَالَ قُلْتُ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِذًا يَحْلِفَ، وَيَذْهَبَ بِمَالِي، فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى ‏{‏إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ ثَمَنًا قَلِيلاً‏}‏ إِلَى آخِرِ الآيَةِ‏.‏

matn_ar: يَهُودِ أَرْضٌ فَجَحَدَنِي، فَقَدَّمْتُهُ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَقَالَ لِي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم " أَلَكَ بَيِّنَةٌ ". قُلْتُ لاَ. قَالَ فَقَالَ لِلْيَهُودِيِّ " احْلِفْ ". قَالَ قُلْتُ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِذًا يَحْلِفَ، وَيَذْهَبَ بِمَالِي، فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى {إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ ثَمَنًا قَلِيلاً} إِلَى آخِرِ الآيَةِ.
matn_ar_clean: يهود أرض فجحدني، فقدمته إلى النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فقال لي رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم " ألك بينة ". قلت لا. قال فقال لليهودي " احلف ". قال قلت يا رسول الله إذا يحلف، ويذهب بمالي، فأنزل الله تعالى {إن الذين يشترون بعهد الله وأيمانهم ثمنا قليلا} إلى آخر الآية.
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated `Abdullah bin Mas`ud:Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) said, "Whoever takes a false oath so as to take the property of a Muslim (illegally) will meet Allah while He will be angry with him." Al-Ash'ath said: By Allah, that saying concerned me. I had common land with a Jew, and the Jew later on denied my ownership, so I took him to the Prophet who asked me whether I had a proof of my ownership. When I replied in the negative, the Prophet asked the Jew to take an oath. I said, "O Allah's Messenger (ﷺ)! He will take an oath and deprive me of my property." So, Allah revealed the following verse: "Verily! Those who purchase a little gain at the cost of Allah's covenant and their oaths
iwh_en: Abdullah bin Mas`ud (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that Allah's Messenger ﷺ said, "Whoever takes a false oath so as to take the property of a Muslim (illegally) will meet Allah while He will be angry with him." Al-Ash'ath said: By Allah, that saying concerned me. I had common land with a Jew, and the Jew later on denied my ownership, so I took him to the Prophet ﷺ who asked me whether I had a proof of my ownership. When I replied in the negative, the Prophet ﷺ asked the Jew to take an oath. I said, "O Allah's Messenger ﷺ! He will take an oath and deprive me of my property." So, Allah revealed the following verse: "Verily! Those who purchase a little gain at the cost of Allah's covenant and their oaths
iwh_id: Abdullah bin Mas`ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, "Whoever takes a salah oath sehingga sebagaimana kepada take the property of a Muslim (illegally) will meet Allah sementara Ia will be angry bersama him." Al-Ash'ath said: By Allah, bahwa saying concerned me. aku had common tanah bersama a Jew, dan the Jew kemudian di menyangkal -ku ownership, sehingga aku mengambil dia kepada Nabi ﷺ yang bertanya saya apakah aku had a proof of -ku ownership. When aku menjawab dalam the negative, Nabi ﷺ bertanya the Jew kepada take an oath. Aku berkata, "O Rasulullah ﷺ! Ia will take an oath dan deprive saya of -ku property." So, Allah mengungkapkan the following ayat: "Verily! Those yang purchase a little gain pada the cost of Allah's covenant dan mereka oaths

ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ، حَدَّثَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عُمَرَ، أَخْبَرَنَا يُونُسُ، عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ كَعْبِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، عَنْ كَعْبٍ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ أَنَّهُ تَقَاضَى ابْنَ أَبِي حَدْرَدٍ دَيْنًا كَانَ لَهُ عَلَيْهِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ، فَارْتَفَعَتْ أَصْوَاتُهُمَا حَتَّى سَمِعَهَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَهْوَ فِي بَيْتِهِ، فَخَرَجَ إِلَيْهِمَا، حَتَّى كَشَفَ سِجْفَ حُجْرَتِهِ فَنَادَى ‏"‏ يَا كَعْبُ ‏"‏‏.‏ قَالَ لَبَّيْكَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ‏.‏ قَالَ ‏"‏ ضَعْ مِنْ دَيْنِكَ هَذَا ‏"‏‏.‏ فَأَوْمَأَ إِلَيْهِ، أَىِ الشَّطْرَ‏.‏ قَالَ لَقَدْ فَعَلْتُ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ‏.‏ قَالَ ‏"‏ قُمْ فَاقْضِهِ ‏"‏‏.‏

matn_ar_clean: إليهما، حتى كشف سجف حجرته فنادى " يا كعب ". قال لبيك يا رسول الله. قال " ضع من دينك هذا ". فأومأ إليه، أى الشطر. قال لقد فعلت يا رسول الله. قال " قم فاقضه ".
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated `Abdullah bin Ka`b bin Malik:Ka`b demanded his debt back from Ibn Abi Hadrad in the Mosque and their voices grew louder till Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) heard them while he was in his house. He came out to them raising the curtain of his room and addressed Ka`b, "O Ka`b!" Ka`b replied, "Labaik, O Allah's Messenger (ﷺ)." (He said to him), "Reduce your debt to one half," gesturing with his hand. Ka`b said, "I have done so, O Allah's Apostle!" On that the Prophet (ﷺ) said to Ibn Abi Hadrad, "Get up and repay the debt, to him

He came out to them raising the curtain of his room and addressed Ka`b, "O Ka`b!" Ka`b replied, "Labaik, O Allah's Messenger ﷺ." (He said to him), "Reduce your debt to one half," gesturing with his hand. Ka`b said, "I have done so, O Allah's Apostle ﷺ!" iwh_id: Abdullah bin Ka`b bin Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa ka`b menuntut -nya debt punggung dari Ibn Abi Hadrad dalam masjid dan mereka voices grew louder hingga Rasulullah ﷺ mendengar mereka sementara ia was dalam -nya house. Ia datang out kepada mereka raising the tirai of -nya kamar dan addressed Ka`b, "O Ka`b!" Ka`b replied, "Labaik, O Rasulullah ﷺ." (Beliau bersabda kepada him), "Reduce kamu debt kepada satu half," gesturing bersama -nya hand. Ka`b berkata, "Aku have done so, O Rasulullah ﷺ!" On bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata kepada Ibn Abi Hadrad, "Get up dan repay the debt, kepada him

ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ يُوسُفَ، أَخْبَرَنَا مَالِكٌ، عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ، عَنْ عُرْوَةَ بْنِ الزُّبَيْرِ، عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ عَبْدٍ الْقَارِيِّ، أَنَّهُ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ عُمَرَ بْنَ الْخَطَّابِ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ هِشَامَ بْنَ حَكِيمِ بْنِ حِزَامٍ، يَقْرَأُ سُورَةَ الْفُرْقَانِ عَلَى غَيْرِ مَا أَقْرَؤُهَا، وَكَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم أَقْرَأَنِيهَا، وَكِدْتُ أَنْ أَعْجَلَ عَلَيْهِ، ثُمَّ أَمْهَلْتُهُ حَتَّى انْصَرَفَ، ثُمَّ لَبَّبْتُهُ بِرِدَائِهِ فَجِئْتُ بِهِ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَقُلْتُ إِنِّي سَمِعْتُ هَذَا يَقْرَأُ عَلَى غَيْرِ مَا أَقْرَأْتَنِيهَا، فَقَالَ لِي ‏"‏ أَرْسِلْهُ ‏"‏‏.‏ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهُ ‏"‏ اقْرَأْ ‏"‏‏.‏ فَقَرَأَ‏.‏ قَالَ ‏"‏ هَكَذَا أُنْزِلَتْ ‏"‏‏.‏ ثُمَّ قَالَ لِي ‏"‏ اقْرَأْ ‏"‏‏.‏ فَقَرَأْتُ فَقَالَ ‏"‏ هَكَذَا أُنْزِلَتْ‏.‏ إِنَّ الْقُرْآنَ أُنْزِلَ عَلَى سَبْعَةِ أَحْرُفٍ فَاقْرَءُوا مِنْهُ مَا تَيَسَّرَ ‏"‏‏.‏

matn_ar_clean: بردائه فجئت به رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم فقلت إني سمعت هذا يقرأ على غير ما أقرأتنيها، فقال لي " أرسله ". ثم قال له " اقرأ ". فقرأ. قال " هكذا أنزلت ". ثم قال لي " اقرأ ". فقرأت فقال " هكذا أنزلت. إن القرآن أنزل على سبعة أحرف فاقرءوا منه ما تيسر ".
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated `Umar bin Al-Khattab:I heard Hisham bin Hakim bin Hizam reciting Surat-al-Furqan in a way different to that of mine. Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) had taught it to me (in a different way). So, I was about to quarrel with him (during the prayer) but I waited till he finished, then I tied his garment round his neck and seized him by it and brought him to Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) and said, "I have heard him reciting Surat-al-Furqan in a way different to the way you taught it to me." The Prophet (ﷺ) ordered me to release him and asked Hisham to recite it. When he recited it, Allah's Apostle said, "It was revealed in this way." He then asked me to recite it. When I recited it, he said, "It was revealed in this way. The Qur'an has been revealed in seven different ways, so recite it in the way that is easier for you
iwh_en: Umar bin Al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that i heard Hisham bin Hakim bin Hizam reciting Surat-al-Furqan in a way different to that of mine. Allah's Messenger ﷺ had taught it to me (in a different way). So, I was about to quarrel with him (during the prayer) but I waited till he finished, then I tied his garment round his neck and seized him by it and brought him to Allah's Messenger ﷺ and said, "I have heard him reciting Surat-al-Furqan in a way different to the way you taught it to me." the Prophet ﷺ ordered me to release him and asked Hisham to recite it. When he recited it, Allah's Apostle ﷺ said, "It was revealed in this way." He then asked me to recite it. When I recited it, he said, "It was revealed in this way. The Qur'an has been revealed in seven different ways, so recite it in the way that is easier for you
iwh_id: Umar bin Al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa aku mendengar Hisham bin Hakim bin Hizam reciting Surat-al-Furqan dalam a way different kepada bahwa of mine. Rasulullah ﷺ had mengajarkan itu kepada saya (in a different way). So, aku was tentang kepada quarrel bersama dia (during shalat) namun aku menunggu hingga ia finished, kemudian aku tied -nya pakaian round -nya neck dan seized dia oleh itu dan membawa dia kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan berkata, "Aku have mendengar dia reciting Surat-al-Furqan dalam a way different kepada the way kamu mengajarkan itu kepada me." Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan saya kepada release dia dan bertanya Hisham kepada recite it. When ia membaca it, Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, "It was mengungkapkan dalam ini way." Ia kemudian bertanya saya kepada recite it. When aku membaca it, ia berkata, "It was mengungkapkan dalam ini way. The Al-Qur'an has been mengungkapkan dalam tujuh different ways, sehingga recite itu dalam the way bahwa is easier untuk you

ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي عَدِيٍّ، عَنْ شُعْبَةَ، عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، عَنْ حُمَيْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ، عَنِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَالَ ‏ "‏ لَقَدْ هَمَمْتُ أَنْ آمُرَ بِالصَّلاَةِ فَتُقَامَ ثُمَّ أُخَالِفَ إِلَى مَنَازِلِ قَوْمٍ لاَ يَشْهَدُونَ الصَّلاَةَ فَأُحَرِّقَ عَلَيْهِمْ ‏"‏‏.‏

matn_ar: بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ، عَنِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَالَ " لَقَدْ هَمَمْتُ أَنْ آمُرَ بِالصَّلاَةِ فَتُقَامَ ثُمَّ أُخَالِفَ إِلَى مَنَازِلِ قَوْمٍ لاَ يَشْهَدُونَ الصَّلاَةَ فَأُحَرِّقَ عَلَيْهِمْ ".
matn_ar_clean: بن عبد الرحمن، عن أبي هريرة، عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال " لقد هممت أن آمر بالصلاة فتقام ثم أخالف إلى منازل قوم لا يشهدون الصلاة فأحرق عليهم ".
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Abu Huraira:The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "No doubt, I intended to order somebody to pronounce the Iqama of the (compulsory congregational) prayer and then I would go to the houses of those who do not attend the prayer and burn their houses over them
iwh_en: Abu Huraira (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ said, "No doubt, I intended to order somebody to pronounce the Iqama of the (compulsory congregational) prayer and then I would go to the houses of those who do not attend the prayer and burn their houses over them
iwh_id: Abu Huraira (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata, "No doubt, aku berniat kepada perintah somebody kepada pronounce the iqamahh of the (compulsory congregational) shalat kemudian aku would go kepada the houses of itu yang do not attend shalat dan burn mereka houses di atas them

ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ، حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ، عَنْ عُرْوَةَ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ ـ رضى الله عنها ـ أَنَّ عَبْدَ بْنَ زَمْعَةَ، وَسَعْدَ بْنَ أَبِي وَقَّاصٍ، اخْتَصَمَا إِلَى النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فِي ابْنِ أَمَةِ زَمْعَةَ فَقَالَ سَعْدٌ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ أَوْصَانِي أَخِي إِذَا قَدِمْتُ أَنْ أَنْظُرَ ابْنَ أَمَةِ زَمْعَةَ فَأَقْبِضَهُ، فَإِنَّهُ ابْنِي‏.‏ وَقَالَ عَبْدُ بْنُ زَمْعَةَ أَخِي وَابْنُ أَمَةِ أَبِي، وُلِدَ عَلَى فِرَاشِ أَبِي‏.‏ فَرَأَى النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم شَبَهًا بَيِّنًا فَقَالَ ‏ "‏ هُوَ لَكَ يَا عَبْدُ بْنَ زَمْعَةَ، الْوَلَدُ لِلْفِرَاشِ، وَاحْتَجِبِي مِنْهُ يَا سَوْدَةُ ‏"‏‏.‏

matn_ar_clean: ن أمة زمعة فأقبضه، فإنه ابني. وقال عبد بن زمعة أخي وابن أمة أبي، ولد على فراش أبي. فرأى النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم شبها بينا فقال " هو لك يا عبد بن زمعة، الولد للفراش، واحتجبي منه يا سودة ".
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Aisha:Abu bin Zam`a and Sa`d bin Abi Waqqas carried the case of their claim of the (ownership) of the son of a slave-girl of Zam`a before the Prophet. Sa`d said, "O Allah's Messenger (ﷺ)! My brother, before his death, told me that when I would return (to Mecca), I should search for the son of the slave-girl of Zam`a and take him into my custody as he was his son." 'Abu bin Zam`a said, 'He is my brother and the son of the slave-girl of my father, and was born on my father's bed." The Prophet (ﷺ) noticed a resemblance between `Utba and the boy but he said, "O 'Abu bin Zam`a! You will get this boy, as the son goes to the owner of the bed. You, Sauda, screen yourself from the boy
iwh_en: Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) reported that abu bin Zam`a and Sa`d bin Abi Waqqas carried the case of their claim of the (ownership) of the son of a slave-girl of Zam`a before the Prophet ﷺ. Sa`d said, "O Allah's Messenger ﷺ! My brother, before his death, told me that when I would return (to Mecca), I should search for the son of the slave-girl of Zam`a and take him into my custody as he was his son." 'Abu bin Zam`a said, 'He is my brother and the son of the slave-girl of my father, and was born on my father's bed." the Prophet ﷺ noticed a resemblance between `Utba and the boy but he said, "O 'Abu bin Zam`a! You will get this boy, as the son goes to the owner of the bed. You, Sauda, screen yourself from the boy
iwh_id: Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) meriwayatkan bahwa abu bin Zam`a dan Sa`d bin Abi Waqqas membawa the case of mereka claim of the (ownership) of the putra of a hamba sahaya-girl of Zam`a sebelum Nabi ﷺ. Sa`d berkata, "O Rasulullah ﷺ! My saudara, sebelum -nya death, memberitahu saya bahwa ketika aku would return (to Makkah), aku should search untuk the putra of the hamba sahaya-girl of Zam`a dan take dia into -ku custody sebagaimana ia was -nya putra." 'Abu bin Zam`a berkata, 'He is -ku saudara dan the putra of the hamba sahaya-girl of -ku ayah, dan was lahir di -ku ayah's bed." Nabi ﷺ memperhatikan a resemblance antara `Utba dan the boy namun ia berkata, "O 'Abu bin Zam`a! Kamu will get ini boy, sebagaimana the putra goes kepada the owner of the bed. You, Sauda, screen yourself dari the boy

ar: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ، حَدَّثَنَا اللَّيْثُ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ، أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ أَبَا هُرَيْرَةَ ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ يَقُولُ بَعَثَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم خَيْلاً قِبَلَ نَجْدٍ، فَجَاءَتْ بِرَجُلٍ مِنْ بَنِي حَنِيفَةَ يُقَالُ لَهُ ثُمَامَةُ بْنُ أُثَالٍ سَيِّدُ أَهْلِ الْيَمَامَةِ، فَرَبَطُوهُ بِسَارِيَةٍ مِنْ سَوَارِي الْمَسْجِدِ، فَخَرَجَ إِلَيْهِ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَالَ ‏"‏ مَا عِنْدَكَ يَا ثُمَامَةُ ‏"‏‏.‏ قَالَ عِنْدِي يَا مُحَمَّدُ خَيْرٌ‏.‏ فَذَكَرَ الْحَدِيثَ قَالَ ‏"‏ أَطْلِقُوا ثُمَامَةَ ‏"‏‏.‏

matn_ar: ٍ مِنْ سَوَارِي الْمَسْجِدِ، فَخَرَجَ إِلَيْهِ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَالَ " مَا عِنْدَكَ يَا ثُمَامَةُ ". قَالَ عِنْدِي يَا مُحَمَّدُ خَيْرٌ. فَذَكَرَ الْحَدِيثَ قَالَ " أَطْلِقُوا ثُمَامَةَ ".
matn_ar_clean: من سواري المسجد، فخرج إليه رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال " ما عندك يا ثمامة ". قال عندي يا محمد خير. فذكر الحديث قال " أطلقوا ثمامة ".

isnad_chain.name_en: Abu Hurairah [may Allah be pleased with him]

sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Abu Huraira:Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) sent horsemen to Najd and they arrested and brought a man called Thumama bin Uthal, the chief of Yamama, and they fastened him to one of the pillars of the Mosque. When Allah's Apostle came up to him; he asked, "What have you to say, O Thumama?" He replied, "I have good news, O Muhammad!" Abu Huraira narrated the whole narration which ended with the order of the Prophet "Release him
iwh_en: Abu Huraira (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that Allah's Messenger ﷺ sent horsemen to Najd and they arrested and brought a man called Thumama bin Uthal, the chief of Yamama, and they fastened him to one of the pillars of the Mosque. When Allah's Apostle ﷺ came up to him; he asked, "What have you to say, O Thumama?" He replied, "I have good news, O Muhammad!" Abu Huraira narrated the whole narration which ended with the order of the Prophet ﷺ "Release him
iwh_id: Abu Huraira (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengutus horsemen kepada Najd dan mereka arrested dan membawa a man called Thumama bin Uthal, the chief of Yamama, dan mereka fastened dia kepada satu of the pillars of masjid. When Rasulullah ﷺ datang up kepada him; ia bertanya, "What have kamu kepada say, O Thumama?" Ia replied, "Aku have baik news, O Muhammad!" Abu Huraira meriwayatkan the seluruh narration yang mengakhiri bersama the perintah of Nabi ﷺ "Release him

ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ يُوسُفَ، حَدَّثَنَا اللَّيْثُ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي سَعِيدُ بْنُ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ، سَمِعَ أَبَا هُرَيْرَةَ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قَالَ بَعَثَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم خَيْلاً قِبَلَ نَجْدٍ، فَجَاءَتْ بِرَجُلٍ مِنْ بَنِي حَنِيفَةَ يُقَالُ لَهُ ثُمَامَةُ بْنُ أُثَالٍ فَرَبَطُوهُ بِسَارِيَةٍ مِنْ سَوَارِي الْمَسْجِدِ‏.‏

matn_ar: يُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم خَيْلاً قِبَلَ نَجْدٍ، فَجَاءَتْ بِرَجُلٍ مِنْ بَنِي حَنِيفَةَ يُقَالُ لَهُ ثُمَامَةُ بْنُ أُثَالٍ فَرَبَطُوهُ بِسَارِيَةٍ مِنْ سَوَارِي الْمَسْجِدِ.
matn_ar_clean: ي صلى الله عليه وسلم خيلا قبل نجد، فجاءت برجل من بني حنيفة يقال له ثمامة بن أثال فربطوه بسارية من سواري المسجد.

isnad_chain.name_en: Abu Hurairah [may Allah be pleased with him]

sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Abu Huraira:The Prophet (ﷺ) sent some horsemen to Najd and they arrested and brought a man called Thumama bin Uthal from the tribe of Bani Hanifa, and they fastened him to one of the pillars of the Mosque
iwh_en: Abu Huraira (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ sent some horsemen to Najd and they arrested and brought a man called Thumama bin Uthal from the tribe of Bani Hanifa, and they fastened him to one of the pillars of the Mosque
iwh_id: Abu Huraira (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ mengutus beberapa horsemen kepada Najd dan mereka arrested dan membawa a man called Thumama bin Uthal dari the tribe of Bani Hanifa, dan mereka fastened dia kepada satu of the pillars of masjid

ar: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ بُكَيْرٍ، حَدَّثَنَا اللَّيْثُ، حَدَّثَنَا جَعْفَرُ بْنُ رَبِيعَةَ،‏.‏ وَقَالَ غَيْرُهُ حَدَّثَنِي اللَّيْثُ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي جَعْفَرُ بْنُ رَبِيعَةَ، عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ هُرْمُزَ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ كَعْبِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ الأَنْصَارِيِّ، عَنْ كَعْبِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ أَنَّهُ كَانَ لَهُ عَلَى عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ أَبِي حَدْرَدٍ الأَسْلَمِيِّ دَيْنٌ، فَلَقِيَهُ فَلَزِمَهُ، فَتَكَلَّمَا حَتَّى ارْتَفَعَتْ أَصْوَاتُهُمَا، فَمَرَّ بِهِمَا النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَقَالَ ‏ "‏ يَا كَعْبُ ‏"‏‏.‏ وَأَشَارَ بِيَدِهِ كَأَنَّهُ يَقُولُ النِّصْفَ، فَأَخَذَ نِصْفَ مَا عَلَيْهِ وَتَرَكَ نِصْفًا‏.‏

matn_ar_clean: ه كان له على عبد الله بن أبي حدرد الأسلمي دين، فلقيه فلزمه، فتكلما حتى ارتفعت أصواتهما، فمر بهما النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فقال " يا كعب ". وأشار بيده كأنه يقول النصف، فأخذ نصف ما عليه وترك نصفا.
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated `Abdullah bin Ka`b bin Malik Al-Ansari from Ka`b bin Malik:That `Abdullah bin Abi Hadrad Al-Aslami owed him some debt. Ka`b met him and caught hold of him and they started talking and their voices grew loudest. The Prophet (ﷺ) passed by them and addressed Ka`b, pointing out to him to reduce the debt to one half. So, Ka`b got one half of the debt and exempted the debtor from the other half
iwh_en: Abdullah bin Ka`b bin Malik Al-Ansari from Ka`b bin Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that that `Abdullah bin Abi Hadrad Al-Aslami owed him some debt. Ka`b met him and caught hold of him and they started talking and their voices grew loudest. the Prophet ﷺ passed by them and addressed Ka`b, pointing out to him to reduce the debt to one half. So, Ka`b got one half of the debt and exempted the debtor from the other half
iwh_id: Abdullah bin Ka`b bin Malik Al-Anshar dari Ka`b bin Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa bahwa `Abdullah bin Abi Hadrad Al-Aslami owed dia beberapa debt. Ka`b met dia dan caught hold of dia dan mereka memulai talraja dan mereka voices grew loudest. Nabi ﷺ melintas mereka dan addressed Ka`b, pointing out kepada dia kepada reduce the debt kepada satu half. So, Ka`b got satu setengah of the debt dan exempted the debtor dari the lain half

ar: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ، حَدَّثَنَا وَهْبُ بْنُ جَرِيرِ بْنِ حَازِمٍ، أَخْبَرَنَا شُعْبَةُ، عَنِ الأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ أَبِي الضُّحَى، عَنْ مَسْرُوقٍ، عَنْ خَبَّابٍ، قَالَ كُنْتُ قَيْنًا فِي الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ وَكَانَ لِي عَلَى الْعَاصِ بْنِ وَائِلٍ دَرَاهِمُ، فَأَتَيْتُهُ أَتَقَاضَاهُ فَقَالَ لاَ أَقْضِيكَ حَتَّى تَكْفُرَ بِمُحَمَّدٍ، فَقُلْتُ لاَ وَاللَّهِ لاَ أَكْفُرُ بِمُحَمَّدٍ صلى الله عليه وسلم حَتَّى يُمِيتَكَ اللَّهُ ثُمَّ يَبْعَثَكَ‏.‏ قَالَ فَدَعْنِي حَتَّى أَمُوتَ ثُمَّ أُبْعَثَ فَأُوتَى مَالاً وَوَلَدًا، ثُمَّ أَقْضِيَكَ‏.‏ فَنَزَلَتْ ‏{‏أَفَرَأَيْتَ الَّذِي كَفَرَ بِآيَاتِنَا وَقَالَ لأُوتَيَنَّ مَالاً وَوَلَدًا‏}‏ الآيَةَ‏.‏

isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ، حَدَّثَنَا وَهْبُ بْنُ جَرِيرِ بْنِ حَازِمٍ، أَخْبَرَنَا شُعْبَةُ، عَنِ الأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ أَبِي الضُّحَى، عَنْ مَسْرُوقٍ، عَنْ خَبَّابٍ، قَالَ كُنْتُ قَيْنًا فِي الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ وَكَانَ لِي عَلَى الْعَاصِ بْنِ وَائِلٍ دَرَاهِمُ، فَأَتَيْتُهُ أَتَقَاضَاهُ فَقَالَ لاَ أَقْضِيكَ حَتَّى تَكْفُرَ بِمُحَمَّدٍ، فَقُلْتُ لاَ وَاللَّهِ لاَ أَكْف
matn_ar: ُرُ بِمُحَمَّدٍ صلى الله عليه وسلم حَتَّى يُمِيتَكَ اللَّهُ ثُمَّ يَبْعَثَكَ. قَالَ فَدَعْنِي حَتَّى أَمُوتَ ثُمَّ أُبْعَثَ فَأُوتَى مَالاً وَوَلَدًا، ثُمَّ أَقْضِيَكَ. فَنَزَلَتْ {أَفَرَأَيْتَ الَّذِي كَفَرَ بِآيَاتِنَا وَقَالَ لأُوتَيَنَّ مَالاً وَوَلَدًا} الآيَةَ.
matn_ar_clean: ر بمحمد صلى الله عليه وسلم حتى يميتك الله ثم يبعثك. قال فدعني حتى أموت ثم أبعث فأوتى مالا وولدا، ثم أقضيك. فنزلت {أفرأيت الذي كفر بآياتنا وقال لأوتين مالا وولدا} الآية.
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Khabbab:I was a blacksmith In the Pre-Islamic period of ignorance, and 'Asi bin Wail owed me some money. I went to him to demand it, but he said to me, "I will not pay you unless you reject faith in Muhammad." I replied, "By Allah, I will never disbelieve Muhammad till Allah lets you die and then resurrects you." He said, "Then wait till I die and come to life again, for then I will be given property and offspring and will pay your right." So, thus revelation came: "Have you seen him who disbelieved in Our signs and yet says, 'I will be given property and offspring?
iwh_en: Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that i was a blacksmith In the Pre-Islamic period of ignorance, and 'Asi bin Wail owed me some money. I went to him to demand it, but he said to me, "I will not pay you unless you reject faith in Muhammad." I replied, "By Allah, I will never disbelieve Muhammad till Allah lets you die and then resurrects you." He said, "Then wait till I die and come to life again, for then I will be given property and offspring and will pay your right." So, thus revelation came: "Have you seen him who disbelieved in Our signs and yet says, 'I will be given property and offspring?
iwh_id: Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa aku was a blacksmith In the masa Jahiliyyahh, dan 'Asi bin Wail owed saya beberapa money. aku pergi kepada dia kepada demand it, namun ia berkata kepada me, "Aku will not pay kamu kecuali jika kamu reject iman dalam Muhammad." aku replied, "By Allah, aku will tidak pernah disbelieve Muhammad hingga Allah lets kamu die kemudian resurrects you." Beliau bersabda, "Then wait hingga aku die dan come kepada kehidupan again, untuk kemudian aku will be diberikan property dan offspring dan will pay kamu right." So, dengan demikian wahyu came: "Have kamu seen dia yang tidak percaya dalam Our signs dan namun says, 'Aku will be diberikan property dan offspring?
